content:
✨ autoskills | Ruby
🎯 Primary Use Case: To automate the installation of AI agent skills based on a project's detected technology stack, streamlining the integration of AI into development.
✨ Key Features: • Automatic tech stack detection • Curated AI agent skill registry • Secure installation process • No configuration required • Support for a wide range of technologies
📖 Summary: Autoskills is a command-line tool that automatically detects a project's technology stack and installs relevant AI agent skills from a curated registry. It simplifies the process of integrating AI capabilities into development workflows by handling the detection, selection, and installation of necessary skill files.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

✨ runtipi | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide an easy-to-use platform for individuals to set up and manage their own personal homeserver with various self-hosted applications.
✨ Key Features: • One-command setup • One-click app installs • Web interface for service management • Docker-based orchestration • Extensible app store with community options
📖 Summary: Runtipi is a user-friendly homeserver orchestrator built with TypeScript, NestJS, and React. It simplifies the management and deployment of self-hosted applications using Docker, accessible through a web interface and an app store.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🔥 PolyCut | Visual Basic .NET
🎯 Primary Use Case: To enable users to repurpose their 3D printers as vinyl cutters, plotters, or engraving machines by converting SVG designs into GCode.
✨ Key Features: • Import and manipulate SVG files (group/layer preservation, boolean operations, transformations) • Support for various tool modes: Cutting, Drawing (with multiple fill patterns), Multipass, Foiling/Engraving
📖 Summary: Polycut is a .NET application that converts SVG files into 2D GCode, enabling 3D printers and CNC machines equipped with cutting or drawing tools to execute designs. It offers features for importing, manipulating, and previewing vector graphics, and can directly upload GCode to Klipper-enabled printers.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

✨ arc-kit | HTML
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a structured, AI-assisted workflow for enterprise architects to manage and govern all aspects of their architecture, from strategy to delivery and assurance.
✨ Key Features: • Establishing and enforcing architecture principles • Analyzing stakeholder drivers, goals, and outcomes
📖 Summary: ArcKit is an enterprise architecture governance toolkit that streamlines strategy, design, delivery, and assurance workflows. It leverages AI assistance to manage architecture principles, stakeholder drivers, risk, business cases, requirements, data modeling, technology research, strategic planning, diagram generation, vendor management, design reviews, and traceability.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🚀 thunderbolt | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a flexible and controllable AI client solution for enterprises and individuals who want to deploy AI models on their own infrastructure, manage their data, and avoid reliance on third-party services.
✨ Key Features: • Open-source, cross-platform AI client • On-premise deployment • Model choice (frontier, local, on-prem) • Data ownership • Eliminates vendor lock-in
📖 Summary: Thunderbolt is an open-source, cross-platform AI client designed for on-premise deployment, allowing users to choose their AI models, own their data, and avoid vendor lock-in. It supports a wide range of platforms and AI models, with features geared towards enterprise use.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source

🚀 DeepGEMM | Cuda
🎯 Primary Use Case: Providing highly optimized matrix multiplication (GEMM) kernels for accelerating computations in large language models and other deep learning applications on NVIDIA GPUs.
✨ Key Features: • Optimized GEMM kernels for FP8, FP4, and BF16 precisions • Fused MoE with overlapped communication (Mega MoE) • MQA scoring for lightning indexer • HyperConnection (HC) support
📖 Summary: DeepGEMM is a high-performance CUDA kernel library for modern large language models, offering optimized GEMM operations for various precisions (FP8, FP4, BF16) and advanced features like fused MoE and MQA scoring. It utilizes a Just-In-Time (JIT) compilation approach for flexibility and performance without requiring CUDA compilation during installation.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
